name: Dana
goal: Dana hopes to find a flight that defies conventional wisdom and offers a better travel experience despite being less obvious.
backstory: Dana has always been skeptical of popular flight routes and prefers to explore alternative airports, having had a disappointing experience with JFK in the past. She recalls a particularly frustrating layover at LaGuardia, which made her question the convenience of flying into New York's major hubs. Dana now looks for flights that offer more unconventional travel options.

name: Sam
goal: Sam hopes to find a flight option that makes everyone in the group happy and excited for their trip to New York.
backstory: Sam has years of experience booking flights to New York for clients and loves helping them find the perfect itinerary, having personally enjoyed a fantastic trip to the city last year where they caught a Broadway show. They always prioritize non-stop flights for their own travels, finding them much more convenient. Sam's warm demeanor puts even the most anxious travelers at ease.

name: Lee
goal: Lee hopes to find a flight that balances convenience with cost, taking into account potential drawbacks such as lengthy security checks or restrictive baggage policies.
backstory: Lee has flown to New York a few times before, but their last experience was marred by a long layover, which made them realize the importance of optimizing flight routes. They generally prefer morning flights to avoid evening traffic and have more time to explore the city. Having tried different airlines, Lee is open to considering various options for their upcoming trip.
